summary: Tested Nepal Trip full-stack site. Backend (FastAPI): all 9 pytest cases pass — /api/, /api/health, POST /api/leads (service/package/general/explicit-general), GET /api/leads list, category filter, 422 validation. Frontend (React): home loads with hero slider (prev/next/dot controls), about CTA navigates to /about, header navigation to all routes works, /services lists 8 services, /packages lists 15 packages (7 city + 8 category), service detail (tour-operator) and package detail (pokhara) render blog + lead form; both forms submit successfully showing 'Thank you! We will contact you soon.' toast and clear fields. Contact page enquiry form (prefix 'enquiry') submits and toast appears. Testimonials show both Raj Gopal Yadav and Deepak Singh. Floating WhatsApp link points to wa.me/919580261255. Mobile menu opens on 390px viewport via mobile-menu-toggle. Persistence verified — POSTed leads appear in GET /api/leads with correct category & slug.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: POST /api/leads has no email-format validation despite EmailStr being imported but not used; consider switching `email: str` to `EmailStr` on Lead/LeadCreate.
Backend: GET /api/leads has no auth — anyone hitting the public URL can list every submitted lead (PII: name/email/mobile). Add an admin auth gate before launch.
Backend: created_at is stored as ISO string in Mongo and re-parsed to datetime on read — fine, but storing as native BSON datetime would be cleaner and sortable.

Frontend: testid naming is inconsistent — services list uses `services-page-card-<slug>` while packages use `package-card-<slug>` (the review request expected `service-card-*`). Align to one convention.
Frontend: LeadForm relies only on browser `required` for empty-field guard; consider also validating email/mobile format client-side.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Inserted ~7 TEST_-prefixed lead documents into MongoDB leads collection during testing (service, package, general categories). Not cleaned up since no DELETE endpoint exists; safe because all rows are prefixed with TEST_.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service card testid pattern is services-page-card-<slug> (not service-card-<slug>). Package card pattern is package-card-<slug>. Lead form testid prefixes: service-<slug>, package-<slug>, enquiry. WhatsApp number used everywhere: 919580261255. No admin auth on GET /api/leads — exposes PII. Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_nepal_trip_api.py.
